name: Tryndamere
description:
Legendary warrior of the North.

Tryndamere is a legendary warrior of the north, whose thirst for battle is fueled by an ancient and mystical rage. Born among the harsh, snow-covered plains of the Freljord, he was raised in the traditions of his clan—warriors who relied solely on their own strength and resilience in the face of death.
creator: Tatetatet
